inline_comments.message: I think we can rename this API to getNumberOfPorts because now this API is part of ComputeTemplateConsolidationData and its clear that its num of ports in this compute

Please define it as local variable, e.g. startingNumberOfPorts because its called in loop multiple time and also it will be more clean to understanding:
int startingNumberOfPorts = getAllComputeTemplateConsolidationData().iterator().next().
getNumberOfPortsPerCompute()

1) I think no need this check (selected line). You are checking it inside of ifAllResources... method.

2) I have me some doubt regarding Original logic (not related to your current change)-> 
if nestedHEATFilesNames empty -> it will return true. This mean that ifAllResourceAreSubInterface will return true but actually there are no subInterfaces ( no nested heat files). I see that this API is called only for nested file and it looks that heatFile will not be empty but its looks me wrong logic that ifAllResourceAreSubInterface  will return true if no nested heat file. Can you please recheck it? I will send mail with more details

Please back
 if (CollectionUtils.isNotEmpty(nestedHeatFileNames)) { before for.
In case nestedHeatFileNames will be null -> it will failed
I mean may be need return false in case its null but please check if its correct.
For now please back if.

substituteServiceTemplateNamesNames - please change NameNames to Names. 
Why you remember nestedHeatFileNames to substituteServiceTemplateNamesNames 
Its looks very long. I think Original nestedHeatFileNames is ok because subsitutesServiceTemplate this is same as nested

In case when size < 1 is actually case when currPortsMap is Empty and in this case you will return before on 
MapUtils.isEmpty(currPortsMap)
so I think you can changes portList.size() <= 1 to portList.size() = 1

In this test you need only to test that computeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal was called with serviceTemplateName that you sent;
Please mock ComputeConsolidationData computeConsolidationData;
You no need negative test in this class. Create Negative Test in ComputeConsolidationDataTest

You need test only what your class doing.
Currenlty you testing also 
FileComputeConsolidationData class

Please mock FileComputeConsolidationData fileComputeConsolidationData for your serviceTemplateName and verify on mock that  
fileComputeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal()
was called
I will send you my tests as example.

For negative test, test case when fileComputeConsolidationData is NULL ( was not set for this service template files name) - Test that it will return true and no exception
Functionality of FileComputeConsolidationData will test in its test class

This test testing case when one port
I think need rename test to something like isNumberOfPortFromEachTypeLegal_OnePorts

Please see additional tests:

1) EntityConsolidationDataList is empty 

2) EntityConsolidationData is null - not sure if its relevant in our flow. Try do it anyway
I think Null test is invalid as we are always verifying null before calling this method, so not adding for not as it will give compile time error

Please move this check isEmpty inside of ifAllResourceAreSubInterface, It should be inside of API because if this API will be called from other place if will be failed in case nestedHeatFileNames is null.
Because ifAllResourceAreSubInterface access to nestedHeatFileNames  check should be inside of this API

You need add additional test when you have mock like in this test but 
fileComputeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal() return false. See that in this case computeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal()  also return false.
You need mock fileComputeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal()something like this: When(fileComputeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal()).thenreturn false

Please add additional test when you 
- first setPorts ports for one type, e.g. PORT_NEUTRON
call to collectAllPortsOfEachTypeFromCompute  and verify 
(like you have now in this test)
- second setPorts with Map of other type, e.g. PORT_NEUTRON_2
and call to collectAllPortsOfEachTypeFromCompute and see for each port type that it collected correct ports
- For both steps check  that values for each port type that its as expected
Please also add check at end of test that mapToBeModified.get(PORT_NEUTRON) return correct values
Please also add check at end of test that mapToBeModified.get(PORT_NEUTRON) return correct values
I think that it will be good if you will check also values of portIds that its as expected

You all right that in current using of this API it will not be situation when list is null but you writing tests for this specific API which in the future can be called with list null. So I think we need add anyway 
CollectionUtils.isEmpty(entityConsolidationDataList)
   return true;
at start of isGetAttrOutFromEntityLegal in EntityConsolidationData class
and also add test for this case ans see that isGetAttrOutFromEntityLegal return true

You are checking here behavior of TypeComputeConsolidationData.isNumberOfComputeConsolidationDataPerTypeLegal and you no need add it here. Need check it in TypeComputeConsolidationDataTest.
Need mock TypeComputeConsolidationDataTest and you already did it in isNumberOfComputeTypesLegalPositive test and its ok.
To test negative case you need not set 
fileComputeConsolidationData.setTypeComputeConsolidationData
so that computeTemplateConsolidationData will be empty.
Just see that isNumberOfComputeTypesLegal will return false in this case

Please add also negative test when computeTemplateConsolidationData is empty -> 
isThereMoreThanOneComputeTypeInstanceNegative will return false

You again testing in this test not only what doing your member, also testing what doing its internal object
e.g.    you no need setPorts and test it as Complex test. You need only test UT of this class. May be using mocks.
In other tests you also still testing more than needed in one class. 
Please first fix all my comments for other test because for part of them I am explaining what should be changed and how. After that please try over all your tests again and see which tests still you need change in order to each test will test only whats related to its logic. Thanks

For tests checking isGetAttrOutFromEntityLegal API need that 
ComputeTemplateConsolidationData will be Mock. Currently its not mock so you are testing not only TypeComputeConsolidationData functionality, you are testing also ComputeTemplateConsolidationData

Please see the comments in previous version: 
items 2) and 3) for this API.

Regarding item 2) - you added tests with ports null and they not failed on NullPointer - its because you sending also empty or null entityConsolidationDataList and its return true because new check for entityConsolidationDataList:
testIsGetAttrOutFromEntityLegal_NullEntityConsolidationDataLis
testIsGetAttrOutFromEntityLegal_EmptyEntityConsolidationDataList
But in case when entityConsolidationDataList not empty but port parameter will be null -> it will failed on NullPointer Please see again my comment 2 and add check in EntityConsolidationData and also add new tests.
Also please see comment 3.

Please change also testIsGetAttrOutFromEntityLegalNegative test to use Mock with
 Mockito.when(computeTemplateConsolidationDataMock.isGetAttrOutFromEntityLegal(Mockito.any(), Mockito.any()))
                .thenReturn(false);
and check that its return false

1) I think you need remove this test. Please verify that you testing this use case in computeTemplateConsolidationDataTest
2) Please add test when computeTemplateConsolidationData is empty (when you not set setComputeTemplateConsolidationData on typeComputeConsolidationData). Verify thta API reeturn true
